creator: alepulver@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hello.

Currently I don't have FreeBSD 7 to test it, but works on 6. So I think
this is a problem with the Linux compatibility (not necessarily a bug
in the later, but maybe a little hack in the port is needed).

The correct place to ask this would be emulation@.

Also could you please try if similar ports work, like
Quake 3 (the RTCW engine is almost identical), Doom 3 and Quake 4
(there are demo versions of all of these)?

Best Regards,
Ale
